scripts.autofix: bun run lint:fix -- --exit-zero && bun run format:check && bun run format && bun run typecheck && bun run pre-commit && bun run cache:clean && bun run ha:best-practices
scripts.ci: bun run install:unit && bun run workflows:check && bun run ha:best-practices
scripts.format: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m ruff format custom_components/ tests/ scripts/ --target-version py314 --no-cache && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python scripts/verify_py314_exception_style.py --fix custom_components/
scripts.format:check: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m ruff format --check custom_components/ tests/ scripts/ --target-version py314 --no-cache && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python scripts/verify_py314_exception_style.py custom_components/
scripts.ha:best-practices: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run compile && bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit && bun run test:ha && bun run cache:clean
scripts.ha:smoke: bun run smoke:prepare-config && bun run smoke:check-config
scripts.ha:test: bun run install:ha && bun run test:ha
scripts.install:ci: python -m pip install --pre -r requirements.txt -r requirements-test.txt && python -m pip install --upgrade ruff pre-commit pyupgrade flake8-type-checking reorder-python-imports && bun run ha:best-practices
scripts.install:ruff-baseline: python -m pip install --upgrade pip && bun run install:unit && python -m pip install ruff
scripts.lint: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m ruff check custom_components/ tests/ scripts/ --target-version py314 --preview --no-cache
scripts.lint:fix: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m ruff check custom_components/ tests/ scripts/ --target-version py314 --preview --no-cache --fix --output-format=concise
scripts.release:zip: cd custom_components/jackery_solarvault && zip -r "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/jackery_solarvault.zip" . -x "*.pyc" "*/__pycache__/*" "*.pytest_cache*" "*.ruff_cache*" && cd "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" && ls -la jackery_solarvault.zip
scripts.smoke:install-ha: echo "Installing Home Assistant ${HA_SPEC}" && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir "homeassistant${HA_SPEC}" && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir "colorlog==6.10.1" && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir -e .
scripts.smoke:prepare-config:
mkdir -p smoke-config/custom_components && cp -r custom_components/jackery_solarvault smoke-config/custom_components/ && printf 'default_config:
logger:
  default: warning
' > smoke-config/configuration.yaml
scripts.tagging:create-tag: git config user.name "github-actions[bot]" && git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com" && git tag -a "${TAG}" -m "Release ${VERSION}" && git push origin "refs/tags/${TAG}"
scripts.tagging:ensure-tag: if git rev-parse --verify --quiet "refs/tags/${TAG}" >/dev/null; then tagged_sha=$(git rev-list -n 1 "${TAG}"); if [ "${tagged_sha}" != "${GITHUB_SHA}" ]; then echo "::error::Tag '${TAG}' already exists at ${tagged_sha}, not ${GITHUB_SHA}"; exit 1; fi; echo "exists=true" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"; echo "Tag '${TAG}' already exists on this commit; nothing to do."; exit 0; fi; echo "exists=false" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run ha:test
scripts.test:ha: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python scripts/run_ha_tests.py -q -p no:cacheprovider -c pytest-ha.ini tests/ha
scripts.test:unit: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest -q -c pyproject.toml -o "addopts=-q -ra --strict-markers --strict-config --tb=short --maxfail=20" -p pytest_asyncio.plugin -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_*.py
